creator: eb30750@gmail.com
text:
When installing virtualbox via pkg_add virtualbox-ose -r the first package, virtualbox-ose, downloaded.  However, the dependent package qt4-doc.4.7.4 does not complete download.  The download just stops with no network activity.

My filesystem has 28.3 GB of free space.

Filesystem 1K-blocks    Used    Avail Capacity  Mounted on
/dev/da0p2  36116700 3553112 29674252    11%    /


BRSINC-BSDHST# pkg_add virtualbox-ose -r
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-9.0-release/Latest/virtualbox-ose.tbz... Done.
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-9.0-release/All/qt4-doc-4.7.4.tbz...

How-To-Repeat: I tried to use this same technique to install virtual box several times and I encounter the same problem over a two day period.
